name: python3-svglib
title: python3-svglib
summary: Python library for reading SVG files and converting them
description:
Python library for reading SVG files and converting them
Used as a package you can read existing SVG files and convert them into
ReportLab Drawing objects that can be used in a variety of contexts, e.g. as
ReportLab Platypus Flowable objects or in RML. As a command-line tool it
converts SVG files into PDF ones (but adding other output formats like bitmap
or EPS is really easy and will be better supported, soon).

commands.name: svg2pdf
commands.description: A converter from SVG to PDF (via ReportLab Graphics)

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use svg2pdf because Python library for reading SVG files and converting them.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use svg2pdf as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `svg2pdf [OPTIONS]... [-o PATH_PAT] [PATH]...` as documented upstream for svg2pdf.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair svg2pdf with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `svg2pdf --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
